sys_script_client.description: New Client Script for 2.7.1, this will set the Default Primary Assignee when the Primary Assignee is blank and the Assigned Member changes 2.7.1 | 2021-11-26 | raj | STRY0114396 - Task Forms- Primary Assignee- Add new constraint logic
sys_script_client.name: Temp Task - onChange - Assigned Member
